ideation: This sequence will show the robot delicately holding a pea pod.  The movement will be slow and gentle to reflect the fragility of the pea pod. Frame 1 will show both arms extended outward in a wide embrace, wrists slightly angled upward to prepare for receiving the pod. Frame 2 will show the arms gently bringing the pod closer to the body, wrists rotating inward to cradle the pod. Frame 3 will show the pea pod held securely, arms slightly bent at the 'shoulders' to provide a gentle cradle. Frame 4 will show the arms beginning to move back to a relaxed position, maintaining a gentle hold on the pea pod before release. Frame 5 will show the robot's arms returning to a relaxed position at the sides, the pea pod having been safely released.

frames.beat: arms open wide, ready to receive
gently drawing the pod inward, cradling it close
holding the pea pod with a tender embrace
slowly releasing the pod, arms begin to lower
arms return to rest, the pod safely delivered
